_comment: Loom Workflow Template — Video Content Pipeline (11 steps). Replace all <PLACEHOLDER> values with your own. See README.md for full instructions.

workflow.name: <Your Page Display Name> Video
workflow.description: Daily video content pipeline — example template

steps._comment: Step 0 — Optional seed value (e.g. random topic/category). Replace with your own seed logic or delete if not needed.
steps.name: Generate Seed

config.code: result = random.choice(['Topic A', 'Topic B', 'Topic C', 'Topic D'])

steps._comment: Step 1 — Generate a unique post idea. Uses lookup_table for de-dup against previous ideas.
steps.name: Generate Idea

config.system_prompt: You are an expert content creator for [YOUR NICHE]. Generate fresh, engaging post ideas for social media.
config.user_prompt:
Create 1 social media post idea for {{Generate Seed}}.

The idea must be:
- Short and specific (1-2 sentences)
- Unique (not matching any previous ideas)
- Hook-driven (catches attention in the first sentence)

Return ONLY the idea, no preamble.

steps._comment: Step 2 — Research / expand the idea into factual content.
steps.name: Research Content

config.system_prompt: You are a researcher specialised in [YOUR NICHE]. Provide accurate, well-sourced background information.
config.user_prompt:
Research factual information for this topic: {{Generate Idea}}

Provide 3-5 key points that support or expand on this idea. Cite specific examples where possible.

steps._comment: Step 3 — Rewrite the research into a script for the video voiceover.
steps.name: Rewrite Content

config.system_prompt: You are a storyteller who turns information into engaging short-form video scripts. Write naturally, use short sentences, and build curiosity.
config.user_prompt:
Rewrite this into a 60-90 second video script:

{{Research Content}}

Structure:
1. Hook (1 sentence — grab attention)
2. Story / main content (3-5 sentences)
3. Takeaway (1 sentence)

Write in [YOUR LANGUAGE]. No headings, no bullet points — just flowing prose.

steps._comment: Step 4 — Generate an SEO-optimised caption to post with the video.
steps.name: Generate Caption

config.system_prompt: You are a Facebook Reels SEO expert. Write captions that maximise reach and engagement.
config.user_prompt:
Write a Facebook caption for this video script:

{{Rewrite Content}}

Requirements:
- 100-200 characters
- Start with a hook question or strong claim
- End with 5-8 relevant hashtags
- Match the tone of the script

steps._comment: Step 5 — Persist the generated content to your data table for tracking + later use by the image workflow.
steps.name: Insert Row

steps._comment: Step 6 — Generate voiceover audio from the script.
steps.name: Generate Voice

steps._comment: Step 7 — Generate the video itself, using the voiceover + script as input.
steps.name: Generate Video

steps._comment: Step 8 — Post the video + caption to Facebook.
steps.name: Post Facebook

steps._comment: Step 9 — Optional first comment (e.g. affiliate link, CTA, follow-up). Delete if not needed.
steps.name: First Comment

config.message: <Your CTA, affiliate link, or follow-up comment here>

steps._comment: Step 10 — Mark the row as posted so the next run picks a fresh idea.
steps.name: Update Posting Status
